creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2009-03-31 15:02:47 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/tagutil        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Tagutil is a pure C BSDL tool to manage tag information on music
  files. It can work with every format supported by taglib.
  
  WWW:    http://hg.kaworu.ch/tagutil/
  
  PR:             133128
  Submitted by:   bapt <baptiste dot daroussin at gmail dot com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1024    +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/audio/tagutil/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/tagutil/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/audio/tagutil/pkg-descr (new)
